title: Shadify
description: Removes block shading and makes the game more vibrant
body:
**Shadify** is a **Minecraft resource pack** designed to **remove the dull block shading** and **make your world look bright and more alive
If you’ve ever used the *Simply No Shading* mod, you’ll instantly recognize the effect — but here, it’s done **purely with a resource pack**, meaning **no mods required**.

![before after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98a989f3b066157573c44d69d86e6038fb5d0086.jpeg)

---

## 🌟 Features

- **Removes block shading** – Say goodbye to those dark corners and flat shadows.
- **Brighter lighting** – The game feels more alive
- **Lightweight** – Works smoothly without affecting performance.
- **Compatible with all shaders** – Can be used alongside visual shaders for unique effects.

---

1. Download the latest version of **Shadify**.
2. Move the `.zip` file into your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Launch Minecraft → **Options → Resource Packs → Select “Shadify”**
4. Enjoy your new, vibrant world! 🌍

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)
